block.header: =N(" paru saraba kazasi ni semu to wa ga mopisi sakura no pana pa tirinikyeru kamo ")
=N(" imo ga na ni kaketaru sakura pana sakaba tune ni ya kwopwimu iya tosi no pa ni ")
=N(" miminasi no ike si uramyesi wagimokwo ga kitutu kadukaba midu pa karenamu ")
=N(" asipikwino yamakadura no kwo kyepu yuku to ware ni tugeseba kapyerikimasi wo ")
=N(" asipikino tamakadura no kwo kyepu no goto idure no kuma wo mitutu kinikyemu ")

=N(" midorikwo no wakigwogami ni pa taratisi papa ni mudakaye pimutuki no papukwogami ni pa yupukataginu pitura ni nupiki unatuki no warapagami ni pa yupipata no swodetukegoromo kisi ware wo nipopiyoru kwora ga yoti ni pa minanowata kagurwosi kami wo makusi moti koko ni kakitare toritukane agete mo maki mi tokimidari warapa ni nasi mi sanitukapu iro natukasiki murasaki no opoaya no kinu suminoye no toposatwowonwo no mapari moti nipoposi kinu ni komanisiki pimo ni nupituke xxx namikasanekite utiswoyasi womi no kwora arikinuno takara no kwora ga ututape pa pete oru nunwo pizarasi no asatedukuri wo xxx xxx xxx inakiwotomye ga tumadopu to ware ni zo okosesi wotikata no putaayasitagutu tobutorino asukawotokwo ga nagame imi nupisi kurwogutu sasipakite nipa ni tatazumye makari na tati to sapuru wotomye ga ponokikite ware ni okosesi mipanada no kinu no obi wo pikiobi nasu karaobi ni torase watatumi no tono no iraka ni tobikakeru sugaru no gotoki kosiboso ni torikazarapi maswokagami torinamekakete ono ga kapo kapyerapi mitutu paru sarite nwopye wo megureba omosirwomi ware wo omope ka sanwotutori kinakikakerapu aki sarite yamapye wo yukeba natukasi to ware wo omope ka amakumo mo yukitanabikinu kapyeritati miti wo kureba utipisasu miyawomina sasutakeno toneriwotokwo mo sinoburapi kapyerapi mitutu ta ga kwo so to ya omopayete aru xxx xxx inisipye sasakisi ware ya pasikiyasi kyepu ya mo kwora ni isa ni to ya omopayete aru xxx xxx inisipye no sakasiki pito mo noti no yo no kagami ni semu to oipito wo okurisi kuruma motikapyerikyeri motikapyerikyeri ")
=N(" sinaba koso apimizu arame ikite araba sirwokami kwora ni opwizu arame ya mo ")
=N(" sirwokami si kwora mo opwinaba kaku no goto wakakyemu kwora ni norayekaneme ya ")
=N(" pasikiyasi okina no uta ni opoposiki kokono no kwora ya kamakete woramu ")
=N(" padi wo sinobwi padi wo modasite koto mo naku monoipanu saki ni ware pa yorinamu ")
=N(" ina mo wo mo posiki manima ni yurusu beki katati pa miyu ya ware mo yorinamu ")
=N(" sini mo iki mo oyazi kokoro to musubitesi tomo ya tagapamu ware mo yorinamu ")
=N(" nani semu to tagapi pa woramu ina mo wo mo tomo no naminami ware mo yorinamu ")
=N(" ani mo arazi ono ga mwi no kara pito no kwo no koto mo tukusazi ware mo yorinamu ")
=N(" padasusuki po ni pa na ide to omopite aru kokoro pa sirayu ware mo yorinamu ")
=N(" suminoye no kwisinwo no pari ni nipopuredo nipopanu ware ya nipopite woramu ")
=N(" paru no nwo no sitakusa nabiki ware mo yori nipopiyorinamu tomo no manima ni ")
=N(" komori nomwi kwopureba kurusi yama no pa yu idekuru tukwi no arapasaba ikani ")
=N(" kaku nomwi ni arikyeru monowo winagapa no oki wo pukamete wa ga mopyerikyeru ")
=N(" nubatamano kurwokami nurete awayuki no puru ni ya kimasu kokoda kwopureba ")
=N(" koto si araba wopatuseyama no ipakwi ni mo komoraba tomoni na omopi wa ga se ")
=N(" asakayama kage sape miyuru yama no wi no asaki kokoro wo wa ga omopanaku ni ")
=N(" suminoye no wodume ni idete ututu ni mo onoduma sura wo kagami to mitu mo ")
=N(" akikapyesi sirasu to no minori araba koso wa ga sitagoromo kapyesitabarame ")
=N(" umaipi wo midu ni kaminasi wa ga matisi kapi pa katute nasi tadani si araneba ")

=N(" saniturapu kimi ga mikoto to tamadusano tukapi mo koneba omopiyamu wa ga mwi pitori zo tipayaburu kamwi ni mo na opose urabye mase kame mo na yaki so kwopwisiku ni itaki wa ga mwi zo itisirwoku mwi ni simitopori murakimono kokoro kudakete sinamu inoti nipakani narinu imasarani kimi ka wa wo ywobu taratineno papa no mikoto ka momotarazu ya swo no timata ni yupuke ni mo ura ni mo so twopu sinu beki wa ga yuwe ")
=N(" urabye wo mo ya swo no timata mo ura twopedo kimi wo apimimu tadoki sirazu mo ")
=N(" wa ga inoti pa wosiku mo arazu saniturapu kimi ni yorite zo nagaku pori suru ")
=N(" siratama pa wodaye siniki to kikisi yuweni so no wo mata nuki wa ga tama ni semu ")
=N(" siratama no wodaye pa makoto sikaredomo so no wo mata nuki pito moti inikyeri ")
=N(" ipye ni arisi pitu ni kagi sasi wosametesi kwopwi no yatukwo no tukamikakarite ")
=N(" karuusu pa tabuse no moto ni wa ga sekwo pa nipubuni wemite tatitemasu miyu ")
=N(" asagasumi kapwiya ga sita no naku kapadu sinwopitutu ari to tugemu kwo moga mo ")
=N(" yupudati no ame utipureba kasuganwo no wobana ga ure no siratuyu omopoyu ")
=N(" yupuduku pi sasu ya kapapye ni tukuru ya no kata wo yorosimi ube yosorikyeri ")
=N(" umasi mono iduku mo akazi wo sakadwora ga tunwo no pukure ni sigupiapinikyemu ")
=N(" tatibana no tera no nagaya ni wa ga winesi unawipanari pa kami agetu ramu ka ")
=N(" tatibana no tereru nagaya ni wa ga winesi unawipanari ni kami agetu ramu ka ")
=N(" sasinabe ni yu wakase kwodomo itipitu no pibasi ywori komu kitune ni amusamu ")
=N(" sugomo siki awona ni motiko utupari ni mukabaki kakete yasumu ko no kimi ")
=N(" patisupa pa kaku koso aru mono okimaro ga ipye n aru mono pa umo no pa ni a rasi ")
=N(" pito puta no me nomwi ni arazu itutu mutu mitu yotu sape ari suguroku no saye ")
=N(" iti ni no me nomwi ni arazu go roku samu si sape arikyeri suguroku no saye ")
=N(" kori nureru tapu ni na yori so kapakuma no kuswobuna pamyeru itaki myeyatukwo ")
=N(" pisiposu ni piru tuki katete tapi negapu ware ni na miye so nagwi no atumono ")
=N(" tamabapaki kariko kamamaro murwonokwi to natume ga moto to kakipakamu tame ")
=N(" ikegamwi no rikizimapi kamo sirasagi no poko kupimotite tobiwataru ramu ")
=N(" karatati no ubara karisoke kura tatemu kuswo topoku mare kusi tukuru twozi ")
=N(" twora ni nori puruya wo kwoyete awoputi ni mwituti tori komu turugitati moga ")
=N(" nasi natume kimi ni apa tugi papukuzuno noti mo apamu to apupipana saku ")
=N(" katumata no ike pa ware siru patisu nasi sika ipu kimi ga pige naki gotosi ")
=N(" narayama no kwonotegasipa no putaomote ni ka ni mo kaku ni mo kwobwibito no tomo ")
=N(" pisakatano ame mo puranu ka patisupa ni tamareru midu no tama ni nitaru mimu ")
=N(" wagimokwo ga nuka ni opwitaru suguroku no kotopi no usi no kura no upe no kasa ")
=N(" wa ga sekwo ga tapusaki ni suru tubureisi no yosinwonoyama ni piwo so sagareru ")
=N(" teratera no myegakwi mawosaku opomiwa no wogakwi tabarite so no kwo paramamu ")
=N(" potoke tukuru masopo tarazupa midu tamaru ikeda no aso ga pana no upe wo pore ")
=N(" warapadomo kusa pa na kari so yapotadewo podumi no aso ga wakikusa wo kare ")
=N(" iduku ni so masopo poru woka komotatami pyeguri no aso ga pana no upe wo pore ")
=N(" nubatamano pida no opogurwo miru gotoni kose no wogurwo si omopoyuru kamo ")
=N(" kwoma tukuru pazi no sibimaro sirwoku areba ube posikaramu so no kurwoiro wo ")
=N(" popusira ga pige no sorikupi uma tunagi itaku na piki so popusi pa nakamu ")
=N(" daniwoti ya sika mo na ipi so satwowosa ga etukwi pataraba imasi mo nakamu ")
=N(" arakwida no sisida no ine wo kura ni tumite ana pwinepwinesi wa ga kwopuraku pa ")
=N(" ikisini no putatu no umi wo itopasimi sipopwi no yama wo sinwopituru kamo ")
=N(" yononaka no sigeki karipo ni sumisumite itaramu kuni no taduki sirazu mo ")
=N(" kokoro wo si mukaunosatwo ni okite araba pakwoya no yama wo mimaku tikakyemu ")
=N(" isanatori umi ya sini suru yama ya sini suru sinure koso umi pa sipo pwite yama pa kare sure ")
=N(" ipamaro ni ware monomawosu natuyase ni yosi to ipu mono so munagi torimyese ")
=N(" yasuyasu mo ikyeraba aramu wo pata ya pata munagi wo toru to kapa ni nagaru na ")
=N(" kaparapudi ni papiobotoreru kuswokadura tayuru koto naku miyadukape semu ")
=N(" baramon no tukureru woda wo pamu karasu manabuta parete patapoko ni wori ")
=N(" ipi pamedo umaku mo arazu inuredomo yasuku mo arazu akanesasu kimi ga kokoro si wasurekanetu mo ")
=N(" ko no koro no wa ga kwopwidikara sirusitume kuu ni mawosaba gowi no kagapuri ")
=N(" ko no koro no wa ga kwopwidikara tabarazupa misatwotukasa ni idete urepemu ")
=N(" opokimi no tukapasanaku ni sakasira ni yukisi arawora oki ni swode puru ")
=N(" arawora wo komu ka kozi ka to ipi morite kadwo ni idetati matedo kimasanu ")
=N(" sikanoyama itaku na kiri so arawora ga yosuka no yama to mi tutu sinwopamu ")
=N(" arawora ga yukinisi pi ywori sika no ama no opouratanu pa sabusiku mo aru ka ")
=N(" tukasa koso sasite mo yarame sakasira ni yukisi arawora nami ni swode puru ")
=N(" arawora pa myekwo no nari woba omopazu ro tosi no yatose wo matedo kimasanu ")
=N(" okitutori kamo to pu pune no kapyerikoba yara no sakimori payaku tugekoso ")
=N(" okitutori kamo to pu pune pa yara no saki tamwite kogiku to kikoyekonu kamo ")
=N(" oki yuku ya akarawobune ni tutwo yaraba kedasi pito mite piraki mimu kamo ")
=N(" opobune ni wobune pikiswope kaduku tomo sika no arawo ni kadukiapame ya mo ")
=N(" murasakino kwogata no umi ni kaduku tori tama kadukideba wa ga tama ni semu ")
=N(" tunwosima no setwo no wakame pa pito no muta arakarisikado wa ga muta pa nikime ")
=N(" wa ga kadwo no e no mwi moripamu momotidori tidori pa kuredo kimi so kimasanu ")
=N(" wa ga kadwo ni tidori sibanaku okwiyo okwiyo wa ga pitoywoduma pito ni sirayu na ")
=N(" iyu sisi wo tunagu kapapye no nikwogusa no mwi no wakakape ni sanesi kwora pa mo ")

=N(" kotosakewo ositare wonwo yu iduru midu nuruku pa idezu simidu no kokoro mo kyeyani omopoyuru oto no sukunaki miti ni apanu kamo sukunaki yo miti ni apasaba irogyeseru sugakasawogasa wa ga unagyeru tama no nana tu wo to torikape mo mawosamu monowo sukunaki miti ni apanu kamo ")
=N(" toyokuni no kiku no ike n aru pisi no ure wo tumu to ya imo ga miswode nurekyemu ")
=N(" kurenawi ni simetesi koromo ame purite nipopi pa su tomo uturopame ya mo ")
=N(" pasitateno kumaki no yara ni sirakwiwono otosiire wasi kakete kakete na nakasi sone ukiiduru ya to mimu wasi ")
=N(" pasitateno kumakisakaya ni manuraru yatukwo wasi sasupitate wite kinamasi wo manuraru yatukwo wasi ")

=N(" kasimane no tukuwe no sima no sitadami wo ipiripi motikite isi moti tutukiyaburi payakapa ni arapisusugi karasipo ni kwogwoto momi takatuki ni mori tukuwe ni tatete papa ni maturitu ya medu kwo no twozi titi ni maturitu ya medu kwo no twozi ")
=N(" oponwodi pa sigedimorimiti sigeku tomo kimi si kaywopaba miti pa pirokyemu ")
=N(" sibutani no putagamiyama ni wasi so kwomu to ipu sasipa ni mo kimi ga mitameni wasi so kwomu to ipu ")
=N(" iyapikwo onore kamusabwi awokumo no tanabiku pi sura kwosame sopopuru ")
=N(" iyapikwo anani kamusabwi awokumo no tanabiku pi sura kwosame sopopuru ")
=N(" iyapikwo kamwi no pumoto ni kyepura mo ka sika no pusu ramu kapakoromo kite tunwo tukinagara ")

=N(" itwokwo nase no kimi wori worite mono ni iyuku to pa karakuni no twora to ipu kamwi wo ikedori ni yatu torimotiki so no kapa wo tatami ni sasi yapyedatami pyeguri no yama ni udukwi to satukwi to no ma ni kusurigari tukapuru toki ni asipikino ko no katayama ni putatu tatu itipi ga moto ni adusayumi yatu tabasami pimekabura yatu tabasami sisi matu to wa ga woru toki ni sawosika no kitati nagekaku tatimatini ware pa sinu besi opokimi ni ware pa tukapemu wa ga tunwo pa mikasa no payasi wa ga mimi pa misumi no tubo wa ga mera pa masumi no kagami wa ga tume pa miyumi no yupazu wa ga kera pa mipumite payasi wa ga kapa pa mipakwo no kapa ni wa ga sisi pa minamasu payasi wa ga kimo mo minamasu payasi wa ga mige pa misipo no payasi oitaru yatukwo wa ga mwi pitotu ni nanapye pana saku yapye pana saku to mawosipayasane mawosipayasane ")

=N(" ositeruya nanipa no woye ni ipo tukuri namarite woru asigani wo opokimi myesu to nani semu ni wa wo myesu rame ya akirakeku wa ga siru koto wo utapito to wa wo myesu rame ya puyepuki to wa wo myesu rame ya kotopiki to wa wo myesu rame ya ka mo kaku mo mikoto ukemu to kyepu kyepu to asuka ni itari tatedomo okina ni itari tukanedomo tukunwo ni itari pimugasi no naka no mikadwo yu mawirikite mikoto ukureba uma ni koso pumodasi kaku mono usi ni koso panaduna pakure asipikino ko no katayama no momunire wo ipoye pagitari amateru ya pinokyeni posi sapiduruya karausu ni tuki nipa ni tatu teusu ni tuki ositeruya nanipa no woye no patutari wo karaku tarikite suwepito no tukureru kame wo kyepu yukite asu torimotiki wa ga mera ni sipo nuritamapi kitapi payasu mo kitapi payasu mo ")
=N(" ame ni aru ya sasaranowonwo ni tigaya kari kayakaribaka ni udura wo tatu mo ")
=N(" oki tu kuni usipaku kimi ga nuriyakata kwinuri no yakata kamwi ga two wataru ")
=N(" pitodama no sawonaru kimi ga tada pitori apyerisi amaywo no paburi wo so omopu ")
